svg.aria-label: Research-based weekly digest cover: Cisco CVSS 9.8 IMC and SSM unauthenticated RCE requiring immediate patch, CVE-2025-55182 React2Shell compromises 766 Next.js hosts stealing AWS keys and GitHub tokens, AWS agentic AI four core security principles for least privilege isolation audit and human oversight, Google Cloud vSphere BRICKSTORM malware defender guide
svg.title: Weekly digest 2026-04-03: Cisco CVSS 9.8 RCE patch, CVE-2025-55182 React2Shell 766 hosts, AWS Agentic AI 4 security principles, vSphere BRICKSTORM defender guide

g.text: Least privilege, isolation, audit, human oversight
Google Cloud defender guide for hypervisor attacks
